task_completion.visual_evidence: The GCompris application window is visible on the screen, showing the main menu or activity categories.
A science activity (e.g., Gravity, Watercycle, Mixing paint colors, Mixing light colors) is open and visible within the GCompris application.

task_completion.description: Evaluate a second, different science activity
task_completion.visual_evidence: A second, distinct science activity is open and visible within the GCompris application.

task_completion.description: Evaluate a third, different science activity
task_completion.visual_evidence: A third, distinct science activity is open and visible within the GCompris application.

task_completion.description: Create the NGSS Curriculum Alignment Report file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor is open with a file named 'science_curriculum_report.txt' saved in the Desktop directory (~/Desktop/).

task_completion.description: Document the evaluated activities, scientific concepts, and grade bands
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text in the report clearly lists at least three activities, mentioning specific scientific concepts (e.g., fluid dynamics, color theory) and suggested grade bands (e.g., K-2, 3-5, 6-8) for each.

task_completion.description: Include an overall recommendation for classroom use
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text in the report includes a concluding section or statement providing an overall recommendation for using GCompris in the classroom.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual GCompris GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the GCompris application running and being navigated, proving the agent didn't just hallucinate the activities from prior knowledge.

integrity.description: The report describes the activities actually viewed
integrity.visual_evidence: The activities listed in the text report should match the ones the agent was seen viewing in the GCompris application.
The report content is visible in a text editor or terminal, showing substantive written evaluation rather than a single copy-pasted block from the prompt.

privileged_info_for_vlm: GCompris is a real educational software suite. Verified science activities in GCompris include 'gravity', 'watercycle' (physics), 'color_mix' (mixing paint colors), and 'color_mix_light' (mixing light colors). The report must be saved at /home/ga/Desktop/science_curriculum_report.txt and should be substantive (at least 450 bytes).
